stemHtml: According to ICAO Annex 11, the lateral limits of a control zone shall extend to at least _____ in the directions from which approaches may be made.

options.a: 3 NM from the centre of the aerodrome or aerodromes concerned
options.b: 4 NM from the centre of the aerodrome or aerodromes concerned
options.c: 5 NM from the centre of the aerodrome or aerodromes concerned
options.d: 10 NM from the centre of the aerodrome or aerodromes concerned
